import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let trimmed = string.trim(line)
  mut n = match string.parse_int(trimmed)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end
  mut sum = 0
  if n == 0
    sum = 0
  else
    while n > 0
      sum = sum + (n % 10)
      n = n / 10
    end
  end
  println("digit_sum=#{sum}")
end
